```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.2em 1em 1.3em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- T-bar: where skills live -->
 <div style="background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;border-radius:12px;padding:0.5em 0.9em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);text-align:left;">
  <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="house" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
  <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;">Claude loads skills only from <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;color:#3A7DC9;padding:0.05em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">~/.claude/skills/</code></div>
 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:0.75em 0 0;"></div>

 <!-- two columns: the pattern (purple) | in practice (teal terminal) -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.08fr;gap:0.9em;align-items:stretch;margin-top:1.2em;">

  <!-- LEFT: the pattern -->
  <div style="position:relative;background:#F5F4FB;border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.8em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(86,84,162,0.14);display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6462B4,#5654A2);padding:0.45em 1em;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(86,84,162,0.4);white-space:nowrap;z-index:2;"><i data-lucide="shield" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>Store it safely</div>

   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.42em;flex:1;justify-content:center;">

    <!-- step 1 -->
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.5em 0.75em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6462B4,#5654A2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFFFFF;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;">1</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.54em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;"><i data-lucide="folder-git-2" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"></i>Keep skills in a Git repo</div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;color:#C7C1E5;line-height:0;"><i data-lucide="chevron-down" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:2.4;"></i></div>

    <!-- step 2 -->
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.5em 0.75em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6462B4,#5654A2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFFFFF;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;">2</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.32em;"><i data-lucide="link" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"></i><span>Symlink into <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.86em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.06em 0.32em;border-radius:5px;">~/.claude/skills/</code></span></div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;color:#C7C1E5;line-height:0;"><i data-lucide="chevron-down" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:2.4;"></i></div>

    <!-- step 3: payoff -->
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6462B4,#5654A2);border-radius:10px;padding:0.5em 0.75em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.32);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.22);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFFFFF;"><i data-lucide="shield-check" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:2.1;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.54em;font-weight:700;color:#FFFFFF;line-height:1.2;">Develop and use, both safe</div>
    </div>

   </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: in practice (terminal) -->
  <div style="position:relative;background:#F4FBF8;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.8em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(44,132,117,0.14);display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3DA890,#2C8475);padding:0.45em 1em;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(44,132,117,0.4);white-space:nowrap;z-index:2;"><i data-lucide="terminal" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>One command</div>

   <div style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:0.7em;">

    <div style="border-radius:11px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);">
     <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.4em 0.75em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;">
      <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
      <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
      <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
     </div>
     <div style="padding:0.85em 1em 0.9em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;line-height:1.85;color:#F8F7F0;">
      <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> ln -s <span style="color:#69B4F0;">~/my-skills/ph-slide</span> \</div>
      <div style="padding-left:1.4em;"><span style="color:#FFB84D;">~/.claude/skills/ph-slide</span></div>
      <div style="margin-top:0.5em;color:#27C93F;">✓ ph-slide <span style="color:#5C6B80;">→</span> ~/my-skills/ph-slide</div>
     </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;font-size:0.48em;color:#137A6E;line-height:1.5;text-align:left;">
     <i data-lucide="git-branch" style="width:1.25em;height:1.25em;stroke-width:1.9;flex:none;"></i>
     <span style="color:#564232;">Edit in your repo; the change is live at once. One source of truth, version-controlled.</span>
    </div>

   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
